svg.title: Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium — vertical flow diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline showing how Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium generates an image from a text prompt, including text encoding, latent diffusion with MMDiT, and VAE decoding.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a text prompt in Stable Diffusion 3.5?')
sendPrompt('How does a negative prompt affect Stable Diffusion output?')
sendPrompt('What does CLIP-L do in Stable Diffusion 3.5?')
sendPrompt('What role does T5-XXL play in SD 3.5 Medium?')
sendPrompt('What does CLIP-G encode in SD 3.5 Medium?')
sendPrompt('How are text embeddings combined for conditioning in SD 3.5?')
sendPrompt('What is the starting latent noise in diffusion models?')
sendPrompt('How does the MMDiT denoising loop work in Stable Diffusion 3.5?')
g.text: Joint attention over image + text tokens

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a denoised latent in Stable Diffusion?')
sendPrompt('How does the VAE decoder work in Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium?')
sendPrompt('What resolution does Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium output?')
